media.title: A cap nerd quirk from the Giannis trade
media.description: Many analysts wondered why Milwaukee Bucks reserve guard Gary Harris opted in to his $3.8 million deal for this year when the Bucks could have persuaded him to opt out and take a $2.4 million veteran'...

items.title: Gary Harris has picked up his $3.8M player option with the Milwaukee Bucks for the 2026-27 season, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
